name: Grade 3 Early Learning — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 3 pathway for building organized skills, vocabulary, and short research products through Early Learning. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 3 knowledge and transferable skills in building organized skills, vocabulary, and short research products through Early Learning.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
